title: rothmannia kuhniana
intro: Rothmannia kuhniana, also known as the Yellow Rothmannia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical West Africa, valued for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, headache, and skin infections. Rothmannia kuhniana can be prepared as an herbal remedy, often in the form of a tea or infusion, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
